description_long: This is a light blue shopping bag with a pair of thin, looped handles and a prominent white circular logo on one side. The bag is made of a flexible material, likely coated paper or lightweight plastic, and is filled with pink tissue paper that protrudes from the top, giving it a festive appearance. On the reverse side, the bag features the text 'Ermua centro comercial' beneath a smaller version of the same circular logo. The bag has a rectangular base and straight sides, with the handles attached at the top edges. The overall design is clean and modern, suitable for retail or gift purposes. The bag appears sturdy enough to carry lightweight items, and its branding suggests it is from a commercial shopping center.
description: A light blue shopping bag with loop handles, white circular logo, and pink tissue paper protruding from the top. Branding and text are visible on one side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large white circular logo on a plain blue background with pink tissue paper visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bag's narrow profile and the protruding pink tissue paper, with minimal visible design.
description_view_2: Back view displays the 'Ermua centro comercial' text and a smaller circular logo, along with the pink tissue paper.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, shows the bag's narrow side and a partial glimpse of the front logo.
attribute_branding_or_logo: White circular logo and 'Ermua centro comercial' text printed on the exterior.
